mapper.select: SELECT EVID.EV_ID_ORDER ,EVID.EV_ID_CONTENTS ,EVID.EV_ID_SCORE ,EVID.EV_ID_SQ ,EVID.EV_ITEM_NUM ,EVID.GATE_CD ,'U' AS INSERT_FLAG FROM STOCEVID EVID WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND EVID.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND EVID.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND EVID.EV_ITEM_NUM = #{EV_ITEM_NUM} ORDER BY EVID.EV_ID_ORDER

SELECT EVID.EV_ID_ORDER ,EVID.EV_ID_CONTENTS ,EVID.FROM_VALUE ,EVID.FROM_CONDITION_CD ,EVID.TO_VALUE ,EVID.TO_CONDITION_CD ,EVID.EV_ID_SCORE ,EVID.EV_ID_SQ ,EVID.EV_ITEM_NUM ,EVID.GATE_CD ,'U' AS INSERT_FLAG FROM STOCEVID EVID WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND EVID.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND EVID.EV_ITEM_NUM = #{EV_ITEM_NUM} ORDER BY EVID.EV_ID_ORDER
